title: hieracium pseudalpinum subsp. tissierei
intro: Hieracium pseudalpinum subsp. tissierei, also known as Hieracium tissieri, is a plant species in the sunflower family, belonging to the genus Hieracium. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Hieracium pseudalpinum subsp. tissierei is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
